prose: **Frontier orbital analysis on oxygen molecule** — performed via DFT using the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (density-fit enabled). Environment: gas phase. Spin multiplicity: triplet (2S+1=3). Charge: 0. Software/backend: PySCF. Geometry provenance: pre-supplied as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz`; used without re-optimization. SCF converged after 7 cycles. The HOMO–LUMO gap was computed as **5.28806 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). HOMO = -8.874 eV; LUMO = -3.586 eV. Detailed outputs written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpsiiyhrqy/live.json`. No warnings reported; calculation integrity certified trustworthy.
